title: manglietia lanuginosa
intro: Manglietia lanuginosa, also known as the bearded manglietia or white manglietia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Magnoliaceae. It is native to China and is traditionally used in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Manglietia lanuginosa is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
